package rulecoverage

func PositiveCrossLayerImportViolationByPackageName() string {
    ruleID := "cross_layer_import_violation_by_package_name"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Imports where package names clearly violate a layered direction such as `repository -> handler` or `model -> gin`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
